title: saussurea subacaulis
intro: Saussurea subacaulis, also known as Chinese club moss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Saussurea subacaulis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Saussurea subacaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
